title: CreateReplyRequest

itemId.description: The ID of the inbox item to reply to

message.description: The content of the reply message

privateReply.description: When true, sends a private message to the user instead of replying publicly to a public item (e.g., comment). The reply will be sent as a direct/private message. Supported by Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter.

excludedUsers.description: List of user IDs to exclude from mentions (Twitter-specific)

description: Request to create a reply to an inbox item
